name: Tom Green
bio: Tom Green is a Canadian comedian, television personality and actor best known for his shock-comedy and prank style. He created and hosted The Tom Green Show, which began on Canadian community television before moving to MTV in the late 1990s and influencing later prank-comedy programs. He has also acted in films, hosted web and live talk shows, and toured as a stand-up comedian.

timeline.ev: The Tom Green Show debuts on Rogers TV
The Tom Green Show moves to MTV
Stars in the films Road Trip and Charlies Angels
Launches the web talk show Tom Green Live
Releases the stand-up special Tom Green Live

accolades: Creator and host of the influential Tom Green Show
Cult film Freddy Got Fingered as director and star

bits.yt_title: Tom Green Doing Stand Up Comedy In Pennsylvania
